glosses.es: bola de masa; albóndiga de masa
glosses.pt: bolinho de massa; bolinho de batata
glosses.ja: 団子; ダンプリング

translations.es: Hoy estoy cocinando bolitas de masa.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, je cuisine des boulettes de pâte.
translations.pt: Hoje estou cozinhando bolinhos de massa.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi nấu bánh bột.
translations.hi: आज मैं डम्पलिंग बना रहा हूँ.
translations.ja: 今日は団子を作っている。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular nominative personal pronoun functioning as the subject of the clause; agrees with the finite verb.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; describes the action performed by the subject.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; situates the action in time (today).
Noun serving as the direct object (accusative). Bare form likely indicates a plural reading in this context (the singular form is identical).

sentences.target: Der Knödel ist noch zu heiß.

translations.de: Der Knödel ist noch zu heiß.
translations.en: The dumpling is still too hot.
translations.es: La bolita de masa aún está demasiado caliente.
translations.fr: La boulette de pâte est encore trop chaude.
translations.it: Il canederlo è ancora troppo caldo.
translations.pt: O bolinho ainda está quente demais.
translations.vi: Cái bánh bột vẫn còn quá nóng.
translations.ar: كرة العجين ما زالت ساخنة جداً.
translations.nl: De knoedel is nog te heet.
translations.hi: डम्पलिंग अभी भी बहुत गर्म है.
translations.el: Το ντάμπλινγκ είναι ακόμα πολύ ζεστό.

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking nominative masculine singular; determines the noun in subject position.
Noun, head of the subject NP; refers to a single dumpling in this definite context.
Copular auxiliary (present, 3rd person singular) linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Temporal/adverbial particle indicating continuation; modifies the predicate to mean “still”.
Degree adverb intensifying the adjective; means “too” (excessive degree), not a preposition here.
Predicate adjective describing the state of the subject; complements the copula.

sentences.target: Im Kühlschrank liegt noch ein Knödel.

translations.de: Im Kühlschrank liegt noch ein Knödel.
translations.en: There’s still a dumpling in the fridge.
translations.es: Todavía hay una bolita de masa en la nevera.
translations.fr: Il reste encore une boulette de pâte dans le frigo.
translations.it: In frigo c’è ancora un canederlo.
translations.ko: 냉장고에 만두가 아직 하나 남아 있어요.
translations.yue: 雪櫃入面仲有一個糰子。
translations.ru: В холодильнике ещё осталась одна клецка.
translations.pt: Ainda tem um bolinho na geladeira.
translations.vi: Trong tủ lạnh vẫn còn một cái bánh bột.
translations.ar: لا يزال هناك كرة عجين في الثلاجة.
translations.nl: Er ligt nog een knoedel in de koelkast.
translations.uk: У холодильнику ще є одна кльоцка.
translations.hu: A hűtőben még van egy gombóc.
translations.hi: फ्रिज में अभी भी एक डम्पलिंग है.
translations.pl: W lodówce został jeszcze jeden knedel.
translations.el: Στο ψυγείο υπάρχει ακόμα ένα ντάμπλινγκ.
translations.nb: Det ligger fortsatt en dumpling i kjøleskapet.
translations.id: Di kulkas masih ada satu pangsit.
translations.sv: Det finns fortfarande en dumpling i kylen.
translations.ro: În frigider mai e o gălușcă.
translations.cs: V lednici je ještě jeden knedlík.
translations.da: Der ligger stadig en dumpling i køleskabet.
translations.ja: 冷蔵庫に団子がまだ一つ残っている。

tokens.explanation: Preposition in fused form (contraction of “in dem”); introduces a locative PP governing dative.
Noun as the object of the preposition; head of the locative PP indicating place.
Intransitive main verb (present, 3rd person singular); denotes location/state of rest.
Adverb indicating continuation; modifies the verb to mean the state persists.
Indefinite article marking nominative masculine singular; determines the post-verbal subject NP.
Noun, head of the subject NP; refers to a single dumpling (subject appears after the verb due to locative-fronting).

sentences.target: Wir bestellen zwei Knödel zum Mitnehmen.

translations.de: Wir bestellen zwei Knödel zum Mitnehmen.
translations.en: We’re ordering two dumplings to go.
translations.es: Pedimos dos bolitas de masa para llevar.
translations.fr: Nous commandons deux boulettes de pâte à emporter.
translations.ko: 우리는 포장으로 만두 두 개를 주문하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们点两个团子打包带走。
translations.pt: Estamos pedindo dois bolinhos para levar.
translations.he: אנחנו מזמינים שתי כופתאות לקחת הביתה.
translations.tr: İki knödel paket olarak sipariş ediyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi gọi hai cái bánh bột để mang đi.
translations.ar: نطلب كرتين من العجين للأخذ معنا.
translations.nl: We bestellen twee knoedels om mee te nemen.
translations.uk: Ми замовляємо дві кльоцки на виніс.
translations.hi: हम ले जाने के लिए दो डम्पलिंग ऑर्डर कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Παραγγέλνουμε δύο ντάμπλινγκ για να τα πάρουμε μαζί.
translations.nb: Vi bestiller to dumplings med hjem.
translations.id: Kami memesan dua pangsit untuk dibawa pulang.
translations.sv: Vi beställer två dumplings att ta med.
translations.cs: Objednáváme si dva knedlíky s sebou.
translations.da: Vi bestiller to dumplings med hjem.
translations.ja: 持ち帰りで団子を二つ注文している。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person plural nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present, 1st person plural); denotes the act of ordering.
Cardinal numeral quantifying the noun; functions as determiner within the object NP.
Noun, head of the direct object NP; plural reference in agreement with the numeral.
Preposition in fused form (contraction of “zu dem”) introducing a purpose PP; commonly used in the set phrase “zum Mitnehmen” (“for takeout”).
Nominalized infinitive (from the separable verb “mitnehmen”); object of the preposition “zum”, expressing purpose (“for takeout”).
